description: This file contains TypeScript code implementing remark plugins for processing MDX/Markdown files. It defines plugins for replacing configuration placeholders and documentation references within markdown content, supporting features like frontmatter processing and AST node transformations.

methods.name: replaceConfigInText
methods.description: Replaces configuration placeholders in text with actual config values.

methods.name: replaceConfigInAttributes
methods.description: Replaces config placeholders within MDX JSX attributes.

methods.name: replaceDocsrefInText
methods.description: Replaces documentation reference placeholders with versioned documentation paths.

methods.name: replaceDocsrefInAttributes
methods.description: Replaces docsref placeholders within MDX JSX attributes.

methods.name: getConfigValueAtPath
methods.description: Retrieves a nested configuration value based on a dot-separated path.

methods.name: replaceInFrontmatter
methods.description: Recursively replaces placeholders in frontmatter data.
